arts.ttl: ‘That’s the key’ - Monaco boss talks defending Lewandowski, Raphinha and Yamal
arts.sum: Monaco boss Adi Hutter has told his team to go ‘all out’ when it comes to defending against Barcelona in the Champions League on Thursday. Hansi Flick takes his team to France after making a perfect start to the new La Liga season, and Hutter says his players must be brave.

arts.ttl: Team News: Monaco vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Champions League clash between Monaco and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona to scout 2 Monaco players during Champions League clash
arts.sum: When Barcelona take to the Stade Louis II pitch against Monaco, sporting director Deco is set to personally scout Caio Henrique and Vanderson as players who fill a need back in Catalonia. But SPORT writes that the Barcelona hierarchy still wish to target recruits at right-back and left-back to strengthen in the winter window, all the while continuing to offer chances to home-grown talent.
